summary: Critical gaps: (1) actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to SHA (requirement violated; should be commit hash); (2) src/Aggregate-TestResults.ps1 missing $ErrorActionPreference='Stop' and Set-StrictMode; (3) Fixtures (./fixtures/*.xml, *.json) and test files (./tests/) referenced throughout but not provided—delivery incomplete; (4) Workflow installs actionlint but never runs it; (5) Aggregation output uses Write-Output instead of $env:GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY for GitHub Actions integration; (6) XML/JSON parsing lacks validation. Test harness expects 30+ Pester tests and exact aggregate values (Passed|7|, Failed|7|, etc.) but fixtures missing prevent validation. Incomplete implementation cannot be shipped.
